subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! At this hour when the light of certitude is rising and shining forth from the manifest horizon, I have taken up the pen and call to mind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی در این حین که نور یقین از افق مبین طالع و ساطع قلم گرفته و بیاد
subcodes.subjects: @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion
